title: pentaphragma poilanei
intro: Pentaphragma poilanei is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Pentaphragmataceae and classified as an evergreen shrub or vine. The medicinal properties of Pentaphragma poilanei lie in its roots, which are traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the roots of Pentaphragma poilanei are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
